description: Hand-curated, source-verified demo news corpus (issue #17). Replaces the 429-blocked GDELT live fetch for the demo. Every item is a REAL event with a REAL, verifiable source_url. AAPL only: MSFT/TSLA are intentionally absent because no verified URLs were available — an honest 1-ticker corpus beats a 3-ticker corpus with invented sources.

items.title: Apple reports Q2 FY2026 results
items.summary: Apple announced its fiscal 2026 second-quarter financial results, with an update on iPhone and Services performance.

items.title: India to assemble 28% of iPhones in 2026
items.summary: India is set to assemble 28% of global iPhones in 2026 as Apple shifts its supply chain beyond China. China's share fell to 74% in 2025 from 83% in 2024, while India's rose from 14% to 23%.

items.title: Apple ships security updates early on AI threat
items.summary: Apple is releasing iOS security updates ahead of its usual version cycle, responding to AI-driven cybersecurity concerns that shorten the window attackers need to exploit flaws.
